form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last in a small field at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw January 29 over 1100m, 1.75 len behind Tough Romance with 54.5kg at $11. On debut fourth of 9 at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw January 9 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Brazen Dechambeau carrying 54.5kg at $101. Will take benefit from this run.
